patch.value: Fix MCP tool-count doc drift (18/21 -> 22, add pm_copy) and lock the claude-plugin smoke to the live tools/list count

README said 18 MCP tools, plugin docs said 21, actual is 22 (pm_copy missing from every enumeration + the smoke required[] list). Corrected README, plugin README, CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN.md, pm-init.md, marketplace.json x2, plugin.json (also 3->4 subagents), and made the smoke assert tools.length === required.length. Found by docs/CI audit.
Shipped: corrected all MCP tool-count docs to 22 (+pm_copy), fixed subagent count 3->4, and the smoke now asserts the live tools/list count. Code count was already locked at 22 by mcp-handshake.
